    FeatureRequest
    Data container used to represent query for multiple features
    IzanamiConnectionInformation
    Class that contains everything needed to establish connection with Izanami.

    This class is a data container used to represent query for a single feature

    Data container that can be used to specify a per feature error/cache strategy for a given query.
